untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external calendar data (fundamental event identification, event scheduling, anticipation direction bias) which is not available in the standard technical indicator set. The core logic depends on: (1) detecting upcoming news events from external calendar, (2) determining market anticipation direction relative to expected outcome, and (3) timing entries 5+ days ahead. These require event-driven data sources outside the allowed indicators. Volume/momentum conditions provided as proxy but cannot capture full signal intent.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using volume ratio as proxy for directional bias momentum. Entry uses elevated volume as signal of anticipation. Exit uses 2:1 return target (approximated as 2% gain) or reversal stop. However, this does not capture the fundamental catalyst event timing or market anticipation direction assessment required by the original signal. A production implementation would require integration with economic calendar and event-based entry logic.
